```quarto
---
title: "Electrodynamics"
format: html
---

# Electrodynamics

These are the lecture notes and problem sets for the Electrodynamics course by Sandro Vitenti. The material is organized into short topic modules; the first entry provides a concise geometry review useful for covariant electrodynamics.

## Course Outline

- [Geometry Review for Electrodynamics](geometry-review.qmd)

{{< include /_footer.qmd >}}

```
